ns0:entry.ns0:title: CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl
Language: julia
ClimaAtmos.jl is an atmosphere model that is designed to leverage data assimilation and machine learning tools for modeling and calibrating subgrid-scale processes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CliMA/ClimaLand.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaLand.jl
Language: julia
Clima's Land Model

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl
Language: julia
🌎 Regional-to-global coupled ocean and sea ice simulations based on Oceananigans

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CliMA/Oceananigans.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl
Language: julia
🌊 Julia software for fast, friendly, flexible, ocean-flavored fluid dynamics on CPUs and GPUs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Deltares/Ribasim
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Deltares/Ribasim
Language: julia
Water resources modeling

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EnzymeAD/Enzyme.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EnzymeAD/Enzyme.jl
Language: julia
Julia bindings for the Enzyme automatic differentiator

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EnzymeAD/Reactant.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EnzymeAD/Reactant.jl
Language: julia
Optimize Julia Functions With MLIR and XLA for High-Performance Execution on CPU, GPU, TPU and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaDiff/DifferentiationInterface.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaDiff/DifferentiationInterface.jl
Language: julia
An interface to various automatic differentiation backends in Julia.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaLang/julia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia
Language: julia
The Julia Programming Language

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaReach/LazySets.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaReach/LazySets.jl
Language: julia
Scalable symbolic-numeric set computations in Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaRegistries/General
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaRegistries/General
Language: julia
The official registry of general Julia packages

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LuxDL/Lux.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LuxDL/Lux.jl
Language: julia
Elegant and Performant Deep Learning

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MakieOrg/Makie.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MakieOrg/Makie.jl
Language: julia
Interactive data visualizations and plotting in Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Nemocas/Nemo.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Nemocas/Nemo.jl
Language: julia
Julia bindings for the FLINT number theory C library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumSavory/QuantumClifford.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumSavory/QuantumClifford.jl
Language: julia
Clifford circuits, graph states, and other quantum Stabilizer formalism tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantumSavory/QuantumSavory.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantumSavory/QuantumSavory.jl
Language: julia
A full stack simulator of quantum hardware, from the low-level analog physics to high-level network dynamics. Includes discrete event simulator, symbolic representation for quantum object, and works with many backend simulators.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/Catalyst.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/Catalyst.jl
Language: julia
Chemical reaction network and systems biology interface for scientific machine learning (SciML). High performance, GPU-parallelized, and O(1) solvers in open source software.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/ModelingToolkit.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/ModelingToolkit.jl
Language: julia
An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/OrdinaryDiffEq.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/OrdinaryDiffEq.jl
Language: julia
High performance ordinary differential equation (ODE) and differential-algebraic equation (DAE) solvers, including neural ordinary differential equations (neural ODEs) and scientific machine learning (SciML)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SpeedyWeather/SpeedyWeather.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SpeedyWeather/SpeedyWeather.jl
Language: julia
Play atmospheric modelling like it's LEGO.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SymbolicML/DynamicExpressions.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SymbolicML/DynamicExpressions.jl
Language: julia
Ridiculously fast symbolic expressions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chalk-lab/Mooncake.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chalk-lab/Mooncake.jl
Language: julia
Implementation of a language-level autograd compiler

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nicolasloizeau/PauliStrings.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nicolasloizeau/PauliStrings.jl
Language: julia
Quantum many body simulations in the Pauli strings representation

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oscar-system/Oscar.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oscar-system/Oscar.jl
Language: julia
A comprehensive open source computer algebra system for computations in algebra, geometry, and number theory.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thofma/Hecke.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
